_comment: Prebuilt WASM published to npm, used as a fallback when the local host cannot build the Zig->WASM toolchain (e.g. macOS 26.4+/27 dropped the arm64 libSystem slice, ziglang/zig#31658). CI/Linux builds from source and remains the source of truth. When a new WASM is published, bump `version` and update the sha256 hashes (sha256 of package/dist/<artifact> in the published tarball).
